headline: Newmont (NEM) Stock Could Be 38.7% Undervalued After Leadership Reshuffle
summary: Leadership reshuffle puts Newmont stock in focus Newmont (NEM) has moved to the center of investor attention after announcing a broad refresh of its executive ranks, including new Chief Financial Officer, Chief Operating Officer and Chief Technical Officer roles effective July 1, 2026. See our latest analysis for Newmont. The leadership reshuffle is landing against a backdrop of firm stock performance for Newmont, with a 1-year total shareholder return of 87.27% and a 3-year total shareholder...
